title: cryptogramma cryptophyllum
intro: Cryptogramma cryptophyllum, also known as the mountain hawthorne, is a perennial plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Cryptogramma cryptophyllum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
